TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit EmbeddingGeneratorExtensions extends System.Object
public ref class EmbeddingGeneratorExtensions abstract sealed

Docs.summary: Provides a collection of static methods for extending instances.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Threading.Tasks.Task<(TInput Value, TEmbedding Embedding)[]> GenerateAndZipAsync<TInput,TEmbedding> (this Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator<TInput,TEmbedding> generator, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<TInput> values, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.EmbeddingGenerationOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TEmbedding : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding;

.method public static hidebysig class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<valuetype System.ValueTuple`2<!!TInput, !!TEmbedding>[]> GenerateAndZipAsync<TInput, (class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding) TEmbedding>(class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator`2<!!TInput, !!TEmbedding> generator, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<!!TInput> values, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.EmbeddingGenerationOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

<Extension()> Public Function GenerateAndZipAsync(Of TInput, TEmbedding) (generator As IEmbeddingGenerator(Of TInput, TEmbedding), values As IEnumerable(Of TInput), Optional options As EmbeddingGenerationOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of ValueTuple(Of TInput, TEmbedding)())

static member GenerateAndZipAsync : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator<'Input, 'Embedding (requires 'Embedding :> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding)> * seq<'Input> * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.EmbeddingGenerationOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<ValueTuple<'Input, 'Embedding>[]> (requires 'Embedding :> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding)

Docs.typeparam: The type from which embeddings will be generated.
The type of embedding to generate.
Docs.param: The collection of values for which to generate embeddings.
The embedding generation options to configure the request.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Generates embeddings for each of the supplied and produces a list that pairs each input value with its resulting embedding.
Docs.returns: An array containing tuples of the input values and the associated generated embeddings.
Docs.exception: The generator did not produce one embedding for each input value.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TEmbedding> GenerateAsync<TInput,TEmbedding> (this Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator<TInput,TEmbedding> generator, TInput value, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.EmbeddingGenerationOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TEmbedding : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding;

static member GenerateAsync : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator<'Input, 'Embedding (requires 'Embedding :> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding)> * 'Input * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.EmbeddingGenerationOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<'Embedding (requires 'Embedding :> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding)> (requires 'Embedding :> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding)

Docs.typeparam: The type from which embeddings will be generated.
The type of embedding to generate.
Docs.param: A value from which an embedding will be generated.
The embedding generation options to configure the request.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Generates an embedding from the specified .
Docs.returns: The generated embedding for the specified .
Docs.remarks: This operations is equivalent to using with a collection composed of the single and then returning the first embedding element from the resulting collection.
Docs.exception: The generator did not produce exactly one embedding.

Docs.typeparam: The type from which embeddings will be generated.
The numeric type of the embedding data.
Docs.param: A value from which an embedding will be generated.
The embedding generation options to configure the request.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Generates an embedding vector from the specified .
Docs.returns: The generated embedding for the specified .
Docs.remarks: This operation is equivalent to using and returning the resulting 's property.
Docs.exception: The generator did not produce exactly one embedding.

static member GetRequiredService : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator * Type * obj -> obj

Docs.param: The type of object being requested.
An optional key that can be used to help identify the target service.
Docs.summary: Asks the for an object of the specified type and throws an exception if one isn't available.
Docs.remarks: The purpose of this method is to allow for the retrieval of services that are required to be provided by the , including itself or any services it might be wrapping.
Docs.exception: No service of the requested type for the specified key is available.
